data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of walk-in support (queue management), which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, while there is evidence of customers entering a waitlist/queue flow, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system effectively manages walk-ins or provides queue management functionalities as required. The evidence pointers indicate that the queue entry status is 'waiting', but it does not confirm the overall management of walk-ins or the expected functionalities associated with it.
gaps: No evidence of effective queue management for walk-ins.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify queue management functionalities for walk-ins
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the system provides functionalities for managing walk-in customers effectively.
